items.title: What is AI fluency? A practical definition (and how to build it)
items.summary: AI fluency is the practical ability to use, direct, and judge AI tools well enough to get reliably better results than you would without them. Here's what it actually means — and how to build it in a few minutes a day.

items.title: What is prompt engineering? A clear definition with examples
items.summary: Prompt engineering is the skill of writing and structuring instructions so an AI model reliably gives you the output you actually want. Here's what it means, why it works, and how to get good at it — with before-and-after examples.
